summary: Comprehensive policy testing with good organization and fixture-based coverage. Pester unit tests well-structured across ConvertTo-ArtifactList, New-RetentionPolicy, Get-DeletionPlan, and Format-CleanupSummary. All three retention policies tested in isolation and combined (standard fixture: 10 artifacts, 4 deleted, 6 retained, 18874368 bytes reclaimed). Edge cases covered: empty lists, disabled policies, mode switching (DRY-RUN vs LIVE). Error paths: invalid JSON, missing fields, negative parameters. Integration testing through run-tests.ps1 validates workflow structure, actionlint, and act execution with exact output matching (~24+ assertions). Gaps: boundary condition testing (artifacts exactly at MaxAgeDays or size limits), invalid date format handling, negative size values, very large numbers, complex multi-workflow keep-latest-N scenarios, and direct Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.ps1 parameter edge cases. Format-CleanupSummary tested only with synthesized plans, not standard fixture directly. Would catch most policy-application regressions but misses some edge case and error scenarios.
